summary: Sub-categories feature (V3) testing complete. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All sub-category features working (25 categories, 'con filtri' labels, drill-down section, sub-chips, feed filtering). DB has 120 facts (19 new V3 facts with sub_category field). Feed filtering by sub_interests working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ GET /api/categories returns 25 categories (20 original + 5 new: Mafia, Guerre, Motori, Macchine, Moto)
✅ All categories have has_subcategories and subcategories fields
✅ 5 new categories have has_subcategories=true with non-empty subcategories arrays
✅ Mafia: 8 subcategories (Cosa Nostra, Camorra, 'Ndrangheta, etc.)
✅ Guerre: 7 subcategories (Prima guerra mondiale, Seconda guerra mondiale, Guerra fredda, Guerre napoleoniche, etc.)
✅ Motori: 7 subcategories (Formula 1, MotoGP, Rally, etc.)
✅ Macchine: 12 subcategories (Ferrari, Lamborghini, Porsche, Fiat, BMW, Mercedes, Tesla, etc.)
✅ Moto: 10 subcategories (Ducati, Harley-Davidson, Yamaha, Honda, Vespa, etc.)
✅ Original 20 categories have has_subcategories=false with empty subcategories arrays
✅ GET /api/subcategories/Macchine returns 12 brands
✅ GET /api/subcategories/Moto returns 10 brands
✅ GET /api/subcategories/Guerre returns 7 periods
✅ GET /api/subcategories/InvalidCategory returns 404
✅ GET /api/subcategories/Scienza (original category) returns empty array
✅ POST /api/auth/sub-interests saves sub_interests correctly
✅ Multiple brands can be saved for one category (e.g., Ferrari + Lamborghini)
✅ Multiple categories can have sub_interests (e.g., Macchine + Moto + Guerre)
✅ Invalid subcategories are filtered out (sanitization working)
✅ GET /api/auth/me returns sub_interests field
✅ Feed filtering by sub_interests works: user with {Macchine: ['Ferrari', 'Lamborghini'], Moto: ['Ducati']} gets only those brands
✅ Empty sub_interests returns all facts from selected categories (4 Macchine facts with brands: Ferrari, Lamborghini, Fiat, Tesla)
✅ All facts have sub_category field (16/16 new category facts have it populated)
✅ DB has 120 facts (19 new V3 facts added via incremental seed)
✅ Frontend: Onboarding shows 25 category cards (testID chip-{Category})
✅ Frontend: All 5 new categories show 'con filtri' label on card
✅ Frontend: Selecting drill-down category shows 'Affina i tuoi gusti' section (testID drilldown-section)
✅ Frontend: Sub-chips have correct testIDs (sub-{Category}-{Sub})
✅ Frontend: 'Tutti' chip present for each drill-down category (testID sub-{Category}-all)
✅ Frontend: Macchine sub-chips: Ferrari, Lamborghini, Tesla, Fiat all present
✅ Frontend: Moto sub-chips: Ducati, Harley-Davidson, Vespa all present
✅ Frontend: Sub-chips are clickable and selectable
✅ Frontend: 'Inizia l'avventura' button saves both interests and sub_interests
✅ Frontend: Navigation to feed screen works after onboarding
✅ Integration: Sub-interests saved via frontend are correctly stored in backend
✅ Integration: Feed filtering respects sub_interests (verified Ferrari-only filter works)
seed_data_creation: Test users created during pytest: TEST_subint_*, TEST_multi_*, TEST_multicat_*, TEST_sanitize_*, TEST_me_*, TEST_feed_ferrari_*, TEST_feed_all_*. Frontend test user: test_onboard_139fd00c@test.com with interests: [Macchine, Moto, Scienza] and sub_interests: {Macchine: [Ferrari, Lamborghini], Moto: [Ducati]}.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sub-categories feature (V3) fully functional. 5 new categories added (Mafia, Guerre, Motori, Macchine, Moto) with sub-category support. Backend API tested with pytest (18/18 passed). Frontend tested with Playwright (all flows working). Feed filtering by sub_interests working correctly (user with Ferrari+Lamborghini preference gets only those brands). DB has 120 facts total (101 original + 19 new V3 facts). All testIDs correctly implemented. No issues found. Feature ready for production.
rca_of_issue: N/A - No issues found. All sub-category features working as designed.
